text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur tells me she's feeling under the
weather, so I take her to the infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna take a nap. I'm fine, so just leave me
be.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Huh? Where am I?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
The damn door won't open... Don't tell me I'm
stuck here.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Tch... Someone clearly doesn't know who they're
messin' with. Like a simple electronic key system
is gonna stop me.

text_block_list.name: Mysterious Man
text_block_list.text: Mwuahaha! Bravo, Air Shakur!

text_block_list.name: Mysterious Man
text_block_list.text:
You certainly live up to your reputation as a
super hacker! Welcome! Allow me to make
introductions.

text_block_list.name: Mysterious Man
text_block_list.text: We are the Sweet Carrot Hater Brigade!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Uh, okay?

text_block_list.name: Mysterious Man
text_block_list.text:
We've been searching for you. Our noble mission
is to seek out allies who will join us in eradicating
glazed carrots from this world!

text_block_list.name: Mysterious Man
text_block_list.text:
Your first task is to utilize your hacking skills to
delete all glazed carrot recipes from the whole
internet!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Wow. That's so dumb it actually hurt my brain to
listen to. Like I have time to help with something
like that.

text_block_list.name: Mysterious Man
text_block_list.text: Say what?!

text_block_list.name: Mysterious Man
text_block_list.text: You refuse to support our noble cause... Don't tell me you're one of those glazers!

text_block_list.name: Mysterious Man
text_block_list.text:
Enough! We can't let the glazers get away with it
any longer! All units, prepare for battle!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: What the hell is going on here?!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
There. I've got control of the building now. I'll just
shut off the elevator and seal the emergency
doors, and...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: That should buy me a little time. Even so...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: I've got no idea what's going on.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Seriously, what am I even running from, really? If I
think about this logic, I should be able to figure it
out. Something like this must be...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Ahhh! I'm dreaming!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Pfff. The Sweet Carrot Hater Brigade? Gimme a
break...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Haha. That was so ridiculous that it was actually
kind of relaxing. But I think it's about time to
wake up and grab something to eat.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
The weirdos sound pretty dangerous... I need to
hurry and get out of here before they find me.

text_block_list.name: Hater Brigade
text_block_list.text: There she is! Don't let her get away!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Tch.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Air Shakur finds herself on the run. Will
the day come when she can put an end to the
Sweet Carrot Hater Brigade's dastardly plans?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Over my dead body!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Damn. That dream was so dumb, it's taken away
my will to do anything. I should've just relaxed in
my dorm room.
